log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!

REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!

REASONING: Throwing rock at Bugbear — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Bugbear — Winged Striker HP: 43/67
--- Bugbear — Winged Striker --- HP: 43/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Bugbear — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Bugbear — Winged Striker HP: 13/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Bugbear — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:9+6=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Bugbear — Winged Striker HP: 4/67
